User.title: User
User.description: A user of the application, either a caregiver or an elderly person.

caregiverId.description: The UID of the caregiver, if the user is an elderly person.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: A task assigned to an elderly person by a caregiver.

caregiverId.description: The UID of the caregiver who created the task.

elderlyId.description: The UID of the elderly person assigned to the task.

title.description: The title or name of the task (e.g., Medicine name).

scheduledTime.description: The scheduled time for the task.

status.description: The current status of the task.

completedAt.description: The time the task was completed.

dosage.description: The dosage of the medicine, if applicable.

instructions.description: Any additional instructions for the task.

/tasks/{taskId}.description: Stores tasks assigned to elderly users.
